author: lOrm
content: Category A root-cause fix applied (crosslink #258). Forensic evidence: Site 1 manager.rs:500-534 — canonicalize(full) at T0, starts_with check at T0, copy_dir_recursive at T1; symlink swap between T0 and T1 bypasses guard. Site 2 git.rs:107 — is_dir() follows symlinks via metadata(), sub-entry race. Fix: copy_dir_recursive_within uses symlink_metadata() per entry (rejects symlinks unconditionally) + per-entry canonicalize+starts_with(allowed_root). Both call sites in manager.rs updated. 4 security tests added in toctou_tests module. cargo build PASS, 1221 tests pass (1212 baseline + 9 new, all 4 toctou tests green).
